overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny suburban Los Santos neighborhood. The character passes palm-lined streets, encounters NPCs on porches, observes a purple lowrider car, and approaches a dog behind a chain-link fence before continuing to an intersection.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny suburban sidewalk in Los Santos, passing a garage with red graffiti and palm trees lining the street. The environment is quiet with no visible pedestrians or vehicles.

purple lowrider car enters the frame from the left and drives along the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a gray house where two NPCs stand on the porch, then turns left along the sidewalk. A distinctive purple lowrider car drives past on the street, and the camera follows the curve of the road.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street as the purple lowrider passes by, then approaches a residential yard where a dog stands behind a chain-link fence. A green dumpster is visible near the fence line.

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the sidewalk, passing the dog behind the fence and walking past two men engaged in conversation. The environment features utility poles and single-family homes with palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with stop sign and billboard

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the stop sign at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward an intersection marked by a stop sign and crosswalk. A yellow billboard is visible on the right side, and a bus can be seen in the distance. The palm tree-lined street continues into the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet suburban neighborhood that gradually opens up toward a busy street intersection. It begins on a sunny sidewalk passing a garage marked with red graffiti and palm trees, before moving toward a gray house where two NPCs stand on a porch. As the character turns left, a purple lowrider drives past, leading the camera across the asphalt street toward a residential yard where a dog stands behind a chain-link fence near a green dumpster. The scene then shifts past two men in conversation and a series of utility poles, moving deeper into the residential area. Finally, the camera approaches a stop sign and crosswalk, passing a yellow billboard as a distant bus appears against a horizon of palm-lined streets.
